title: Citibank event-driven access control platform
summary: Built an event-driven access-control platform that reduced manual provisioning by ~70 percent and improved auditability across financial systems.
situation: Manual entitlement workflows were slow and error-prone.
task: Design backend services that could translate access requests, route approval workflows, and maintain reliable processing under load.
actions: Designed event-driven services using Solace and GemFire.
Built APIs on OpenShift and owned service contracts.
Implemented retry, backoff, and idempotent handling patterns.
Improved observability and diagnosed production bottlenecks.
Introduced AI-assisted developer workflows to shorten iteration cycles.
results: Improved throughput and reduced latency across critical workflows.

title: SK Battery real-time ingestion and observability
summary: Built ingestion pipelines and monitoring systems for a multi-billion-dollar EV manufacturing facility.
situation: Production-line systems produced high-volume event streams requiring near-real-time visibility.
task: Create reliable ingestion services and operational monitoring.
actions: Built real-time ingestion services for high-volume event streams.
Designed monitoring and alerting for throughput, latency, and failures.
Improved event processing reliability and operational analytics.
results: Reduced blind spots in production pipeline health.

title: JPMC serverless migration
summary: Led migration of a legacy mortgage platform to AWS serverless architecture.
situation: A legacy mortgage system needed better scalability and lower cost.
task: Migrate core workflows to serverless infrastructure with reproducible environments.
actions: Led design using Lambda, Step Functions, and Fargate.
Built Terraform infrastructure for reproducible environments.
results: Scaled to thousands of concurrent users.

title: Wells Fargo SaaS pricing API
summary: Architected a SaaS pricing API for high-value financial clients and decomposed monoliths into Spring Boot services.

title: Citi fraud detection support system
summary: Built Java backend systems and integration layers for planning AI-driven fraud detection workflows across 5M+ daily transactions.
